evidence: Unit 2.6 zero-loss state machinery — commits 0cbd676 (A: currentState + atomic-next + topo.ts extraction + context-current-state tool + current-state.ts), 5758d1f (B source: status-consistency invariant class + status-vocab.ts + currentState bucketing + planned->todo defaults fix), 97e095b (B config-data: 3 task-relationship relation_types + 4 status-consistency declarations into conception.json + .project/config.json). Verified DEC-0018: build/check/test green (pi-context 486 / pi-jit-agents 151 / behavior-monitors 157 / pi-workflows 829, 0 fail). status-consistency: 6 tests (require fires+clears, forbid fires, edge-gated silent, when_bucket filter, vocabulary-neutral via status_buckets override). Runtime demo: currentState('.') derives focus/inFlight/nextActions/blocked; validateProject('.') reports 0 status-consistency issues (edge-gated on the frozen edgeless .project). Adversarial: grep confirms no block/status/relation literal in the consumer; no project-sdk<->roadmap-plan cycle. Sub-unit C (harness-side projection) reclassified out of extension scope per the DEC-0040 amendment (commit ce9fe92). Sub-unit D (commit 4cbcf31): +12 status-bucket completeness mappings (samples-conception vocab) + status-vocab.test.ts conception-completeness guard. Additivity proof: validateProject('.') issue-set byte-identical HEAD-statusvocab vs D-statusvocab on the same substrate (the 58->59 delta was the TASK-047 cascade filing, not a bucket effect); currentState('.') unchanged. Adversarial: guard fails citing closed [framework-gaps] when the mapping is removed, green on restore. pi-context 490 tests (+4).
